name: Gatling Gun
description: A Jakobs assault rifle with a rotating barrel, behaving more like a hand-cranked minigun than a normal semi-auto rifle. It can reach a very high practical fire rate if you keep tapping fast enough, and its strong per-shot damage lets it dump heavy burst quickly. The downside is fierce recoil, a thirsty magazine, and the usual slow Jakobs reload.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher.
